name: abrdn Silver ETF Trust
business: The abrdn Silver ETF Trust issues shares representing fractional beneficial interests in its net assets, which consist of silver bullion. The trust's objective is for the value of each share to approximately reflect the price of physical silver less liabilities. Shares trade on NYSE Arca under symbol SIVR.
sellsTo: Investors seeking exposure to silver prices
Authorized Participants (registered broker-dealers and financial institutions)
